entity: Wilt Chamberlain career regular-season total points = 31,419 (BBR). Warehouse SUM(avg_pts*gp) = 31,417 (delta 2, rounding; stable anchor)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_pts * gp)) AS career_pts FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 76375 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 31,417 PTS but BBR's official Wilt Chamberlain career regular-season total is 31,419. The 2-point delta is small (one missed field goal across 14 seasons) but real and consistent with the same agg_player_season gap pattern seen for Stockton, Wilt REB, Malone, Nash, Kidd, Russell, Olajuwon, Dirk, Duncan. Pairs with the existing career_total.wilt_trb regression (Wilt REB undercount of 84) to document that the gap extends to the PTS column as well. Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 31,419.
